children.description: Children rendered inside the ripple host.

color.description: Override the ripple color (defaults to currentColor).

center.description: Always start the ripple at the center, regardless of tap location.

variant.description: Visual style. 'material' is the standard tap ripple, 'subtle' is a faint variant, 'highlight' uses the primary color, 'outline' adds a focus ring on activation.

disabled.description: Disable ripple emission and pointer interaction.

className.description: Additional CSS class for the wrapper.

as.description: Element type to render. Use 'button' when used as a clickable surface.

role.description: ARIA role for the host element.

tabIndex.description: Tab order index for keyboard navigation.

ariaLabel.description: Accessible name for the host element.

style.description: Inline style passed through to the host element.
